chapter_title.en: Chapter on Precaution in Giving Testimony

text: 3359 - رُوِيَ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ غُرَابٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لاَ تَشْهَدَنَّ عَلَى شَهَادَةٍ حَتَّى تَعْرِفَهَا كَمَا تَعْرِفُ كَفَّكَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3359 - It is narrated from Ali ibn Ghurab, from Abu Abdillah (as):
Imam (as) said: "Do not testify to a testimony until you know it as clearly as you know your own palm."
